name: Ben Carson
subject: Some very good news...
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28026601:26922747289:m:1:876315805:73B2BA2D8950F569F0B1DFADF7328858:r)
---
|

Peter,

I have some very good news -- this weekend we won the Southern Republican Leadership Conference (SRLC) GOP Presidential Straw Poll. I told the SRLC audience in Oklahoma City what I tell audiences every day. This great nation was formed to be "of the people, by the people, and for the people." It was never supposed to create a political governing class that controls more and more of our lives.

**The response was overwhelming.**

The media and the political class don't know what to do with us quite yet. They discount me by saying things like "Ben Carson has no political experience."

For once the ruling political class is right. I have never voted for a budget we could not afford. I have never voted to raise the debt limit. I have never voted to raise taxes. And I have never promised a lobbyist anything for a donation.
**It defies logic that the political class thinks this is what America needs more of.
** | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28026601:26922747289:m:1:876315805:73B2BA2D8950F569F0B1DFADF7328858:r)
---
My experience is different. I know what it is like to be very poor. I know what it is like to be told you will never amount to much. I know what it is like to have a mother that refused to let you make excuses.

My mother made me read my way through the Detroit Public Library and right into Yale.
I became a pediatric brain surgeon and spent my life caring for over 15,000 patients, many of them very sick children. I collected 67 honorary doctorate degrees. Time Magazine labeled me one of the top scientists in the world. President Bush gave me the Presidential Medal of Freedom.

I have traveled, lectured, and saved lives in 57 countries around the world.

All along the way Candy and I created our foundation that has helped almost 8,000 students pay for college.

Still, I have no "political" experience.

**This country doesn 't need more politics.** **This country needs a revival.**

All of my life never once did I dream of becoming President. I was busy making a difference. And that is exactly why I am running today.

I am not counting on lobbyists lining up to fund my campaign. I am counting on people like you and me. People that are sickened and ashamed of what has been coming out of Washington. People that are willing to stand up and fight for the future of our great country, because our children and their children are worth fighting for.

**[Please stand with me. Together, we can heal, inspire and revive this great nation](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28026601:26922747289:m:1:876315805:73B2BA2D8950F569F0B1DFADF7328858:r).**

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28026601:26922747289:m:1:876315805:73B2BA2D8950F569F0B1DFADF7328858:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28026602:26922747289:m:1:876315805:73B2BA2D8950F569F0B1DFADF7328858:r)
---
|
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28026603:26922747289:m:1:876315805:73B2BA2D8950F569F0B1DFADF7328858:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28026604:26922747289:m:1:876315805:73B2BA2D8950F569F0B1DFADF7328858:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28026605:26922747289:m:1:876315805:73B2BA2D8950F569F0B1DFADF7328858:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28026606:26922747289:m:1:876315805:73B2BA2D8950F569F0B1DFADF7328858:r)
---|---|---|---
Make a donation | | Show your support for Ben on social media

Carson America | 1800 Diagonal Rd Suite 140 | Alexandria, VA 22314

| Paid for by Carson America
---

name: Rand Paul
subject: White House attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Barack Obama effectively labeled me Enemy #1 for refusing to back down on ending illegal NSA snooping, taking what one major news outlet referred to as a direct "swipe" at me and my campaign.

I don't mind a bit.

Midnight Sunday is the line President Obama drew in the sand yesterday when he demanded the U.S. Senate pass the House-approved "reform" bill to keep bulk collection of the American people's phone data going.

Fellow Conservative, I've drawn my line in the sand too. And I'm not backing down.

On Sunday, I'm going to fight to END the NSA's illegal spying program with everything I've got.

**[Can I count on you to be in my corner on Sunday, Fellow Conservative](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28032135:26927116648:m:1:879035888:D66E38B933B2A7EC384B9F02E72F8E4F:r)**?

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28032135:26927116648:m:1:879035888:D66E38B933B2A7EC384B9F02E72F8E4F:r)

And can I count on you to please **[chip in a contribution](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28032135:26927116648:m:1:879035888:D66E38B933B2A7EC384B9F02E72F8E4F:r)** to help me mobilize a grassroots army of freedom-loving Patriots to end the NSA's illegal spying program?

As someone who took an oath to protect and defend the Constitution, I refuse to stand by and allow Congress to continue the NSA's illegal spying program without putting up a fight.

The Second Court of Appeals \- the court right below the Supreme Court - just ruled the program illegal.

Instead of demanding Congress continue the NSA's illegal spying program, Barack Obama should take action and end the illegal program himself.

After all, it was an Executive Order that started NSA spying in the first place. And it can be undone by Executive Order.

But Barack Obama refuses to budge.

So on Sunday, I plan to end the illegal program for him.

**[Will you pledge to stand with me as I stare down Barack Obama and his spy state allies on the Senate floor by adding your name to this fight](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28032135:26927116648:m:1:879035888:D66E38B933B2A7EC384B9F02E72F8E4F:r)**?

If I'm going to slug it out Sunday with the spy state apologists, I'm going to need all the help and support I can get.

Unfortunately, it seems the president, the senior senator from Arizona and other members of the "eye roll" caucus who can't stand any mention of the Bill of Rights are all operating out of the same playbook.

They've all painted a giant target on my back as someone who must be railroaded in order to ram through some type of phony "reform" bill before midnight Sunday.

If Barack Obama and his spy state allies wish to continue the NSA's illegal spying program after midnight Sunday - they're going to have to first get through me - and the hundreds of thousands of Patriots standing in my corner!

I'm counting on you to be one of those Patriots in my corner on Sunday, Fellow Conservative.

**[So please let me know you've got my back by adding your name to the fight to end illegal spying](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28032135:26927116648:m:1:879035888:D66E38B933B2A7EC384B9F02E72F8E4F:r)**.

The good news is, the Washington Machine's smear campaign proves you and I are winning this battle.

The American people are sick and tired of business as usual, and our message is resonating among Americans of all backgrounds.

In fact, recent polls have me defeating Hillary Clinton in key swing states like Colorado, Iowa, New Hampshire and Pennsylvania.

One member of the media even called me "Hillary Clinton's Kryptonite!"

So once you've added your name to this fight, please forward this email to your friends, family, coworkers and neighbors and ask them to join you and me in this fight by adding their name.

As I mentioned, I'm taking on the entire Washington Machine - from the White House on down on Sunday.

That's why I need as many folks with me as possible in my corner.

So Fellow Conservative, after you've added your name, can I count on you to **[please chip in](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28032135:26927116648:m:1:879035888:D66E38B933B2A7EC384B9F02E72F8E4F:r)** to help me mobilize as many Patriots as possible before Sunday's deadline?

Are you with me, Fellow Conservative?

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28032136:26927116648:m:1:879035888:D66E38B933B2A7EC384B9F02E72F8E4F:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28032137:26927116648:m:1:879035888:D66E38B933B2A7EC384B9F02E72F8E4F:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28032138:26927116648:m:1:879035888:D66E38B933B2A7EC384B9F02E72F8E4F:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

name: KP Trueblood, Hillary for America
subject: One day left to win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Your chance to meet Hillary. | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI3MjEwMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyNjQ5ODU1S0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend --

Our budget is how we make sure we're able to build a campaign that can win. No one spends any money on this campaign without running it by my team first. That includes anything from hiring an organizer in South Carolina to buying a coffee maker to -- as you may have guessed -- two plane tickets to the rally next month.

**[We're choosing the winner tomorrow -- if you haven't added your name to be automatically entered for a chance to win, why not do that right now?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI3MjEwMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyNjQ5ODU1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I don't say yes to everything -- but I said yes to this request. This is a huge moment, and our very first rally. You really should be there with Hillary before she walks on stage to launch this campaign.

**Get your name in the hat before tomorrow for a free flight to the big rally (and a free hotel room -- for you and a guest. I really got excited about this one).

[ https://www.hillaryclinton.com/meet-hillary/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjI3MjEwMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyNjQ5ODU1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

KP

Kimberly Panicek Trueblood
Budget Director
Hillary for America [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI3MjEwMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyNjQ5ODU1S0&mt=1&rt=0) Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 5/11/15 and 5/28/15 or 5/29/15 and 6/5/15. Enter by contributing [**here**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI3MjEwMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyNjQ5ODU1S0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [**here**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI3MjEwMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyNjQ5ODU1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. Two winners will receive a special invitation to a campaign event with Hillary Clinton, round trip tickets for winners to event from within the 50 U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico, two nights hotel accommodations (approx. retail value of all prizes $2000). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201.
| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI3MjEwMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyNjQ5ODU1S0&mt=1&rt=0).
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI3MjEwMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyNjQ5ODU1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Team Marco
subject: Birthday surprise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42232811:17273549656:m:1:1349778030:F8BCD8FB0038EF0779C4C3CA53E54F9F:r)
---
Peter-- Tomorrow is Marco's birthday and we're hoping to surprise him by raising $44,000 in honor of his 44th birthday. He'll be in Las Vegas celebrating after a busy day on the campaign trail and we want our campaign manager to be able to tell him that we reached our surprise fundraising goal. **[_Click here to donate now to contribute to the birthday goal and then leave your message to Marco._](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42232812:17273549656:m:1:1349778030:F8BCD8FB0038EF0779C4C3CA53E54F9F:r)** If we can reach our goal in time to tell Marco at his birthday party, we know it will really make his day. The whole team is working to ensure our campaign has the resources to get Marco's positive, winning message in front of the right voters. Your support is crucial. Thank you! -Team Marco
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42232813:17273549656:m:1:1349778030:F8BCD8FB0038EF0779C4C3CA53E54F9F:r)
| Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |

name: Alexandra
subject: did you purchase this, Fellow Conservative?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

What you say on your phone is none of the
government's damn business!

That's why, last week, Senator Paul
filibustered the extension of the illegal NSA spying program for
over 10 hours on the floor of the U.S. Senate.

Why did he do this?

Because he believes the Fourth Amendment
means what it says. He believes you have a right to privacy and
no government bureaucrat or president can
take that away from you!

While Senator Paul successfully delayed the
extension of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" and the NSA's spying
program, the fight is not over.

In fact, the Senate is set to reconvene on
May 31st for an emergency session where defenders of the
spy-state will have only eight hours to save
the NSA's bulk data collection programs before they expire.

Rand isn't backing down from the fight and I
hope you're going to be standing strong with him for the upcoming
showdown in the Senate.

We want to make sure supporters like you are
prepared for this historic moment so we're offering these special
edition "Rand Paul Filibuster Starter Packs"
for a limited time in our official campaign store!

With your purchase you'll receive a unique
"NSA Knows" t-shirt and bumper sticker, along with our
top-selling spy cam blocker!

Follow this link to purchase your starter
pack and show everyone that you #StandWithRand against illegal
NSA spying:

https://store.randpaul.com/index.php/filibuster-starter-pack.html.

This will be our best chance to end illegal
NSA spying once and for all, so we can't afford to miss this
opportunity!

Help show your support for Rand by clicking
right here to order your starter pack.

In Liberty,

Alexandra

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Mark
subject: ALERT: Pending deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
_****_
****
****
[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI3MjI4OTkS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYyNjYzMDkzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
_**
**_
Peter,

Our monthly fundraising deadline is only 4 days away. Will you help us hit our fundraising goal?
[**BECOME A MEMBER NOW >>>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI3MjI4OTkS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYyNjYzMDkzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
With only 4 days left, there isn't much time left. Your support will be used in our fight for a limited federal government that returns power to the taxpayer. It is essential we have the resources to fight against the liberal elites and their millionaire and billionaire supporters. [Will you become a member before our monthly deadline?](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI3MjI4OTkS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYyNjYzMDkzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Mark Stephenson
Our American Revival

__
__
__
__
__

**ABOUT OUR AMERICAN REVIVAL** Our American Revival believes that the government closest to the people is the most responsive and accountable to the people. We share the vision of our founders - that the powers of the federal government should be limited to those specified in the Constitution, and that federal overreach infringes on our American freedoms and values.

We will work with citizens and leaders across the country to promote policies that restore power to the states and their people. We will help lead a revival of the values that make our nation great, by highlighting ideas and policies that protect our shared American values while limiting the size and scope of government.[MAKE A SECURE CONTRIBUTION >>>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI3MjI4OTkS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYyNjYzMDkzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

**

****
**

Paid for by Our American Revival

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Our American Revival. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Our American Revival's online community. If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Our American Revival, click [here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=22722899&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYyNjYzMDkzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Robby Mook, Hillary for America
subject: Four reasons to add your name:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Your chance to meet Hillary. | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI3MjU1MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyNjg0NzIzS0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend --

**[Time is almost up -- you have less than 24 hours to add your name and get the chance to be flown out to our surprise location and meet Hillary in person during our big campaign kickoff.
](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI3MjU1MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyNjg0NzIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)**
Let's review:
* This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.
* You'll have a blast spending time with our best supporters!
* Meeting Hillary. In person. At a huge moment in this campaign.

And finally...

* It's going to be over really soon -- less than 24 hours left -- so don't miss your chance!

So what do you say, will you join us?

**Sign up now for your chance to win:
**
**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/meet-hillary/
](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjI3MjU1MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyNjg0NzIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)**
See you soon!

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

**P.S. -- Seriously, this will be a really fun time.[**Add your name now and be entered to win!**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjI3MjU1MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyNjg0NzIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjI3MjU1MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyNjg0NzIzS0&mt=1&rt=0) Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 5/11/15 and 5/28/15 or 5/29/15 and 6/5/15. Enter by contributing [**here**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjI3MjU1MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyNjg0NzIzS0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [**here**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI3MjU1MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyNjg0NzIzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. Two winners will receive a special invitation to a campaign event with Hillary Clinton, round trip tickets for winners to event from within the 50 U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico, two nights hotel accommodations (approx. retail value of all prizes $2000). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201.
| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI3MjU1MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyNjg0NzIzS0&mt=1&rt=0).
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjI3MjU1MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyNjg0NzIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Team Bernie
subject: PHOTOS: Bernie's campaign launch yesterday
body:
#
Friend,
We're still in awe.
Watching thousands of Vermonters come together in Burlington yesterday to see Bernie officially kick off our campaign for president was something to behold. We pulled together some of our favorite shots so you can get a feeling of what it was like.
[**Check out photos and video from Bernie's campaign launch and share them with your friends and family.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2177/43f17890/5e544f75/621dd53a/2737005806/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/share/launch-photos?source=em150527")
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2177/43f17890/5e544f75/621dd53a/2737005806/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/share/launch-photos?source=em150527")

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2177/43f17890/5e544f75/621dd53a/2737005806/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/share/launch-photos?source=em150527")

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2177/43f17890/5e544f75/621dd53a/2737005806/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/share/launch-photos?source=em150527")
[**Click here to see more photos and video from the campaign kickoff.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2177/43f17890/5e544f75/621dd53a/2737005806/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/share/launch-photos?source=em150527")
Thanks again for all your support,
Team Bernie
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2177/43f17890/5e544f75/621dd53b/2737005806/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/political-revolution?refcode=em150527")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but if you'd like to, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2177/43f17890/5e544f75/621dd538/2737005806/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2177/43f17890/5e544f75/621dd539/2737005806/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
